emails.subject: Re: deal # 572033.01
emails.body: Re: deal 572033.01 It should have been Sierra Power Corp. I've changed it. Thanks, kate Melissa Ann Murphy 04/06/2001 11:58 AM

emails.body: deal 572033.01 Hello, Sierra Pacific Power Company called me and they don't recognize this trade. Could it possibly be with another counterparty? Thanks, Melissa (713) 853-1886
